title: RepoScantinel: An Intelligent Multi-Language GitHub Repository Vulnerability Scanner with Unified Risk Scoring
data:
A Rani. A- 2026 Third International Conference on Networking, 2026
Open-source software repositories frequently contain security vulnerabilities that go 
undetected for extended periods, posing serious threats to the applications that 
depend on them. This paper introduces RepoScantinel, an intelligent web-based 
platform designed to automatically identify and assess such vulnerabilities across 
GitHub repositories written in multiple programming languages. The system 
combines two complementary static analysis enginesBandit for Python-specific
